name: Clickjacking Protection
description: X-Frame-Options must be 'DENY' or 'SAMEORIGIN' to prevent frame-hijacking.

name: Content Security Policy (CSP)
description: CSP header is missing. A strong CSP is required to restrict unauthorized assets.

name: HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS)
description: HSTS check skipped for plain HTTP connection.
observed: Target is plain HTTP, cannot enforce HSTS.

name: Information Exposure: Server Headers
description: Ensures server version info or backend tech stack is not disclosed.

name: CORS Configuration
description: CORS configuration restricts unauthorized cross-origin requests.

name: Information Exposure: .env
description: Verifies that Critical application configuration and credentials is inaccessible to public users.

name: Information Exposure: Composer Config
description: Verifies that Lists backend project packages and versions is inaccessible to public users.

name: Information Exposure: NPM Config
description: Verifies that Lists frontend project packages and versions is inaccessible to public users.

name: Information Exposure: Laravel Logs
description: Verifies that Application execution logs containing potential secrets is inaccessible to public users.

name: Information Exposure: Vendor Directory
description: Verifies that Backend dependency folder structures is inaccessible to public users.

name: Information Exposure: Public API Auth check
description: Verifies that Authenticated private document route is inaccessible to public users.

name: Information Exposure: Admin Route check
description: Verifies that Super-admin dashboard endpoints is inaccessible to public users.
